title: First look at Unit 08 and Mari from the theatrical teaser for 3010
display_title: First look at Unit 08 and Mari from the theatrical teaser for 3010
wikitext:
[]: First look at Unit 08 and Mari from the theatrical teaser for 3.0+1.0             Quote Post by Joseki » Fri Jul 20, 2018 4:41 am tweet-body — twitter-user (@username) date document.querySelectorAll('blockquote.twitter-tweet > a').forEach((t) => t.href = t.href.replace('x.com', 'twitter.com')) tweet-body — twitter-user (@username) date document.querySelectorAll('blockquote.twitter-tweet > a').forEach((t) => t.href = t.href.replace('x.com', 'twitter.com'))

[]: Re: First look at Unit 08 and Mari from the theatrical teaser for 3.0+1.0             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Jul 20, 2018 5:34 am Well that's disappointingly atrotious.

[]: Re: First look at Unit 08 and Mari from the theatrical teaser for 3.0+1.0             Quote Post by Arcadia's legacy » Fri Jul 20, 2018 5:41 am Well, when you don't have Nerv's budget, you gotta make the best with what you have

[]: Re: First look at Unit 08 and Mari from the theatrical teaser for 3.0+1.0             Quote Post by Joseki » Fri Jul 20, 2018 5:43 am "Cut C-3" This is either the third cut to be produced or the third cut in the movie. Unit 08+02 is officially dead I'd say.

[]: Re: First look at Unit 08 and Mari from the theatrical teaser for 3.0+1.0             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Jul 20, 2018 6:24 am Arcadia's legacy wrote: Well, when you don't have Nerv's budget, you gotta make the best with what you have

[]: Re: First look at Unit 08 and Mari from the theatrical teaser for 3.0+1.0             Quote Post by Joseki » Fri Jul 20, 2018 7:12 am Mari has a new plugsuit old one  SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: First look at Unit 08 and Mari from the theatrical teaser for 3.0+1.0             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Fri Jul 20, 2018 7:15 am Joseki wrote: "Cut C-3" This is either the third cut to be produced or the third cut in the movie.

[]: Re: First look at Unit 08 and Mari from the theatrical teaser for 3.0+1.0             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Fri Jul 20, 2018 7:21 am TMBounty_Hunter wrote: 3rd cut of the trailer. Look at the tweet :【シンエヴァ 特報 スタッフ】 It's a trailer made on it's own, so there's zero guarantee any of it will make it into the actual movie. Dare I say the choreography is strikingly similar to that first space Eva-02 trailer we got during a special TV broadcast.

[]: Re: First look at Unit 08 and Mari from the theatrical teaser for 3.0+1.0             Quote Post by Giji Shinka » Fri Jul 20, 2018 7:24 am Looks like a last minute repair by Wille.

[]: Re: First look at Unit 08 and Mari from the theatrical teaser for 3.0+1.0             Quote Post by Joseki » Fri Jul 20, 2018 7:26 am TMBounty_Hunter wrote: 3rd cut of the trailer. Look at the tweet :【シンエヴァ 特報 スタッフ】 It's a trailer made on it's own, so there's zero guarantee any of it will make it into the actual movie. Dare I say the choreography is strikingly similar to that first space Eva-02 trailer we got during a special TV broadcast.

[]: Re: First look at Unit 08 and Mari from the theatrical teaser for 3.0+1.0             Quote Post by Amitch91 » Fri Jul 20, 2018 8:08 am I'm a little skeptical that ANY of this will actually be in the movie (going by what happened with the 3.0 next time preview, and how far out from the release that we still are)

[]: Re: First look at Unit 08 and Mari from the theatrical teaser for 3.0+1.0             Quote Post by riffraff11235 » Fri Jul 20, 2018 8:20 am Amitch91 wrote: I'm a little skeptical that ANY of this will actually be in the movie (going by what happened with the 3.0 next time preview, and how far out from the release that we still are)

[]: Re: First look at Unit 08 and Mari from the theatrical teaser for 3.0+1.0             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Fri Jul 20, 2018 8:41 am None of this footage will be in the actual movie - the Salvage Eva Unit 08 is shooting at nothing in a void - BUT most assuredly there will be a scene where Mari has to pilot Unit 08 on a mission and gets into a shooting exchange. It could quite possibly be the opening scene of the film.

[]: Re: First look at Unit 08 and Mari from the theatrical teaser for 3.0+1.0             Quote Post by Ornette » Fri Jul 20, 2018 9:57 am More screenshots: https://www.evageeks.org/2018/07/evange ... -0-teaser/

[]: Re: First look at Unit 08 and Mari from the theatrical teaser for 3.0+1.0             Quote Post by Joseki » Fri Jul 20, 2018 10:17 am In the screenshots the lack of polish is quite evident, this looks like a very quick work with little to none post processing and effects. Music and background are reused from 3.0 too.

[]: Re: First look at Unit 08 and Mari from the theatrical teaser for 3.0+1.0             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Fri Jul 20, 2018 10:30 am Expected. It's basically this but for the final movie: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=-0ARUWN2rSw

[]: Re: First look at Unit 08 and Mari from the theatrical teaser for 3.0+1.0             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Fri Jul 20, 2018 11:52 am Reichu wrote: This atrocity upon 08 only makes sense if it's a temporary measure the Wunder crew resort to while in the field, and by the time New 02 is unveiled Eva-08 is fully refurbished.

[]: Re: First look at Unit 08 and Mari from the theatrical teaser for 3.0+1.0             Quote Post by Sicarius VI » Fri Jul 20, 2018 12:03 pm Here is a working link to the teaser. https://i.4cdn.org/a/1532085844869.webm

[]: Re: First look at Unit 08 and Mari from the theatrical teaser for 3.0+1.0             Quote Post by airman4 » Fri Jul 20, 2018 12:09 pm Reichu wrote: We know they have "budget", though -- you've seen New Eva-02, haven't you? That is (effectively, given level of damage) completely replacing and outfitting a destroyed Eva. Replacing a pair of arms is nothing in comparison. This atrocity upon 08 only makes sense if it's a temporary measure the Wunder crew resort to while in the field, and by the time New 02 is unveiled Eva-08 is fully refurbished.

[]: Re: First look at Unit 08 and Mari from the theatrical teaser for 3.0+1.0             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Fri Jul 20, 2018 12:39 pm Would not be surprised if whatever the teaser footage pertains to is from the very start of the film & takes place not too long after the end of 3.0. Unit 08 is still in bandages. ( Bandages that can be bloodied up and detailed in more final animation ) Perhaps while the core three - Shinji, Rei & Asuka - are still wandering the red desert WILLE/the Wunder are attacked by something from NERV and they have to send out their only functional Eva + Pilot to fight it off. Mari does her best & it's a big action set piece with a glorious Shiro Sagisu score that blows everyones minds. But Unit 08 mostly gets destroyed in the process and then later in the film it's parts are combined with the remains of Unit 02 to create the amalgamation Unit if it's still a thing. The theorizing continues....
